name: answer-with-fallback
description: Answer a Rust question from the curated KB; if the ground-check says the KB doesn't cover it, fall back to searching the std API docs (tier 2) and answer from those. Two-tier escalation triggered by the existing uncertainty signal.

nodes.comment: Constrained pick of the relevant KB entry id(s).
Read the entries and run the ground-check. answerable=False is the uncertainty signal that escalates to tier 2.
Tier-2 fallback: hybrid (BM25 + embed) search of the std docs. No-op when the KB already covered it (answerable=True).
Answer from KB context (tier 1) if covered, else from std doc excerpts (tier 2), else decline.
